variables.notes: REVIEWED. The Balance Sheet contains two separate rows both labeled exactly 'Equity'. One appears to exclude minority interest (375.51 vs 376.41 in 2025 with Minority Interest 0.9), while the later duplicate appears to include it. Because row labels must be exact and cannot distinguish row occurrence, manual review is needed to ensure BE excludes non-controlling interests and avoid double counting with MIB.
